event_comments:
A thumb compass was found at the event and turned into the download table – if this is yours please reach out to epunch@cascadeoc.org. We have it with our epunch gear and you can pick it up next meet!
Thank you to all volunteers for helping make this event a success!
Source includes result status definitions for msp, dnf, nc, dq, ovt, dns, and starred times.
